actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour id 939 (m_Script guid 6e888d82ad62a4fd99699eeee0553755) maps to ShowMessage on MessageText, which exposes RunMessage(string). To reach ShowText coroutine and cover fade-in/wait/fade-out, we must invoke RunMessage with a string. However: (1) MessageText has no Rigidbody/Collider/EventTrigger, so it cannot be directly triggered per action constraints; (2) RunMessage requires a string parameter, but Trigger only supports parameterless methods; (3) ShowMessage expects a parent CanvasGroup (via GetComponentInParent<CanvasGroup>()), which is not confirmed in the provided scene excerpt. Please provide either a UI Event (m_Calls) from a Button/EventTrigger wired to RunMessage with a test string, or a parameterless proxy method on the same component that internally calls RunMessage with a fixed string, and confirm the parent CanvasGroup component/fileID.
